arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Everton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Two sides in dire need of points collide in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon when Everton visit fellow strugglers Ipswich Town. The Hatters have shown some resolve on their long-awaited return to England's top flight, drawing four games on the trot before being smashed 4-1 at West Ham United.
